text.title: Monorepo Setup with Turborepo Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real deployments. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Every change in any package invalidates every cache entry; CI grows to 35 minutes.
antipattern.fix: Add inputs (src/**, tsconfig.json, package.json) per task.

antipattern.symptom: import ../../packages/ui/Button; TypeScript project references break, turbo cache misses.
CI rebuilds 12 packages from scratch every run; queue time exceeds developer patience.
